description_long: This is a traditional academic mortarboard, commonly known as a graduation cap, featuring a flat, square-shaped black board on top with a central button and a gold tassel draped over one side. The cap sits atop a rounded, smooth crown that appears to be made of a soft, fabric-covered material, likely felt or polyester. The tassel is thick and textured, hanging from the button at the center of the board and extending down one side, signifying academic achievement. The underside of the board and the band encircling the crown are both dark, contrasting with the lighter, off-white color of the crown itself. The overall construction is lightweight, designed to be worn comfortably on the head for ceremonial occasions. The cap is displayed on a simple, square base for support, which is not part of the wearable item.
description: A classic black academic mortarboard with a gold tassel and a rounded, off-white crown, designed for graduation ceremonies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, square black board with a central button and the rounded, off-white crown beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold tassel draped over the right side and the smooth transition between the board and the crown.
description_view_2: Angled rear view emphasizing the length and texture of the gold tassel as it hangs down the side of the crown.
description_view_3: Back-left view showing the board's edge and the attachment point of the tassel, with the crown's curvature visible.
